title: Long Multiplication
description:
Given a pair of numbers, show the complete long multiplication result:

    123
     95
  -----
    615
   1107
  -----
  11685
input: Two lines, each with a positive integer. Each integer will have from 1 through 20 digits.
source: Olympiad, USA Computing Olympiad, 1998-1999 Season, USACO Winter 1999 Contest, Division B
